hero.description: A Fullstack Developer deeply diving into the world of web development. Creating engaging, interactive, and meaningful web experiences.

about.description_1: Hello! I am {name}, a student and fullstack developer who loves the world of programming. I believe every line of code is a small step towards a big solution.
about.description_2: I love learning new things, exploring technology, and creating web interfaces that are not only attractive but also useful. Outside of coding, I am also active in IT infrastructure and hardware.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A collection of my best works in building functional and aesthetic web applications.

certificates.title: Certifications
certificates.subtitle: Tangible proof of my learning journey and dedication to deepening IT technology.

contact.title: Let's Create Something Great
contact.subtitle: Have a project idea or just want to say hi? I'm always open for new discussions and collaborations.
